title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
